debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
inst✝ : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
w : ℕ
args : Vector (ZMod p) w
cs : Clap.Cs p (ZMod p)
i : ℕ
h : i < w
h' : ¬args[i] = 0
h'' : ¬args[i] = 1
⊢ Clap.Cs.eval p inst✝ (Clap.assert_bits_e p inst✝ (ZMod p) w args cs) = denotation.n

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
| zero => linarith
  | succ w ih =>
    have h_unfold : args = Vector.insertIdx args.tail 0 args.head := by
      simp only [Vector.insertIdx_zero]
      ext j hj
      match j with | 0 => simp | j+1 => simp
    rw [h_unfold] at h' h'' ⊢
    unfold assert_bits_e Vector.foldl
    simp only [Vector.toArray_insertIdx, Array.foldl_insertIdx_zero, List.foldl_toArray', List.foldl_cons]
    if hi : i = 0 then
      subst hi
      simp only [Vector.getElem_insertIdx_zero] at h' h''
      have h_n : ∀ {as : List (ZMod p)} {C : Cs p (ZMod p)}, C.eval = .n → (as.foldl assert_bit_e C).eval = .n := by
        intro as; induction as with
        | nil => intro C hC; exact hC
        | cons a as ih_n => intro C hC; simp [List.foldl_cons, ih_n, assert_bit_e, Cs.eval, hC]
      apply h_n
      simp [assert_bit_e, Cs.eval]
      intro hz; cases mul_eq_zero.mp hz with
      | inl h0 => exact h' h0
      | inr h1 => rw [sub_eq_zero] at h1; exact h'' h1
    else
      have h_pos : 0 < i := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hi
      let i' := i - 1
      have hi' : i' < w := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ (by rwa [Nat.succ_pred h_pos])
      simp only [Vector.getElem_insertIdx_succ h_pos] at h' h''
      apply ih args.tail (assert_bit_e cs args.head) i' hi' h' h''
